headline: How Comcast (CMCSA) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Weigh Fiber Risks And Profitability
summary: Comcast’s updated fair value estimate now sits at US$32.74, compared with the prior US$32.68. This reflects only a very small shift in the modeled price target. That modest change lines up with a split in recent analyst commentary, where some are lifting targets on confidence in execution while others stay cautious around growth and competitive pressure from fiber. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Comcast from here. Analyst Price Targets...
